name: agent-3.1
task: Create crypto treasury dashboard UI. Build a new React page (Treasury.tsx) that displays total crypto assets under management, current allocations, and historical performance using charts.

name: agent-3.2
task: Add stablecoin backing visualization. Create UI components that show the exact fiat reserves, audit links, and 1:1 backing proof for USDC/USDT/DAI held by the platform.

name: agent-3.3
task: Build tokenization interface for asset backing. Implement a form and display dashboard for converting real-world assets (Real Estate, Commodities) into fractionalized on-chain tokens.

name: agent-3.4
task: Add crypto wallet integration display. Build a component that allows users to link their Web3 wallets (e.g., MetaMask, Phantom) and displays their balances securely.

name: agent-3.5
task: Create yield farming/staking tracking. Build a module that tracks and projects the APY/ROI for funds deployed into DeFi staking contracts.

name: agent-3.6
task: Build DeFi protocol integration panel. Create an interface to interact directly with protocols like Aave or Compound to supply/borrow assets from within the ANAVI dashboard.

name: agent-3.7
task: Add real-time crypto price feeds. Integrate a websocket or polling service (e.g., CoinGecko API) to show live ticker prices for BTC, ETH, SOL, and platform tokens.

name: agent-3.8
task: Build business credit application workflow for zero percent loans. Implement a multi-step form wizard for users to apply for credit lines against their existing investments or assets.

name: agent-3.9
task: Create loan tracking and management UI. Build a dashboard section showing active loans, outstanding balances, upcoming payment dates, and interest accrued.

name: agent-3.10
task: Build loan-to-investment conversion tracking. Implement logic and UI to allow users to take a loan and immediately reinvest it into a new platform deal, tracking the entire flow.
